title: Moderation Queue Summary - April 19
body:
Abuse queue triage complete.

Actions taken:
• Banned 2 users (spam_wave_42 for phishing, toxic_runner for harassment)
• Warned 1 user (bot_like_user_77 for suspicious automation)
• Closed 3 reports without sanction (1 false positive from brigading, 1 trusted member dispute, 1 new member formatting issue)

All 6 reports processed. Zero trusted members sanctioned.
